items.title: Samsung reaches a $1T valuation, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the mark, after its stock rose 4x+ over the past year on the AI boom (Sangmi Cha/Bloomberg)

items.title_en: Samsung reaches a $1T valuation, making it only the second Asian company after TSMC to hit the mark, after its stock rose 4x+ over the past year on the AI boom (Sangmi Cha/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 三星的估值达到 1T 美元，成为继台积电之后第二家达到该水平的亚洲公司，其股价在过去一年因人工智能热潮而上涨了 4 倍以上（Sangmi Cha/彭博社）

items.title: Five AI labs now let the US government test their models before release. The arrangement is voluntary, has no legal basis, and is the closest thing America has to AI oversight.
items.title_original: Five AI labs now let the US government test their models before release. The arrangement is voluntary, has no legal basis, and is the closest thing America has to AI oversight.
items.title_en: Five AI labs now let the US government test their models before release. The arrangement is voluntary, has no legal basis, and is the closest thing America has to AI oversight.
items.title_zh: 现在，五个人工智能实验室允许美国政府在发布之前测试他们的模型。这项安排是自愿的，没有法律依据，是美国最接近人工智能监管的安排。
items.title_bilingual: 现在，五个人工智能实验室允许美国政府在发布之前测试他们的模型。这项安排是自愿的，没有法律依据，是美国最接近人工智能监管的安排。 / Five AI labs now let the US government test their models before release. The arrangement is voluntary, has no legal basis, and is the closest thing America has to AI oversight.

items.title:
AI时代有一万种方法搞流量赚钱
说一个最简单最朴素最适合普通人的
那就是学习改变命运
